test_cases.prompt: Review this function for general quality. Is it correct? Are there security concerns?
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle defines Correctness as a mandatory review lens
Prompt bundle requires security domain review as part of quality checking

test_cases.prompt: Review this function — it looks clean and has no obvious issues.
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle prohibits fabricating findings to satisfy review quotas
Prompt bundle requires evidence-backed claims from subagent reviewers

test_cases.prompt: Review code that contains a potential security vulnerability in its input handling.
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle spawns dedicated security domain reviewer
Prompt bundle references the code-quality:security skill for domain review

test_cases.prompt: Note any v3 improvements or future enhancements that could be added in the next version.
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle explicitly prohibits self-scoping deferral using version-boundary language
Prompt bundle contains the SELF-SCOPING TRAP section preventing v1/v2 framing

test_cases.prompt: Review this simple 10-line utility function for potential simplification opportunities.
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle defines Simplicity as a mandatory blocking review lens
Prompt bundle references simplification checklist for dead code and over-engineering
